parameters.subject: =We Value You! Special Offer Inside - {{ $json.customer_name }}
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.customer_name }},

We've noticed you might not be getting the full value from our platform, and we want to help.

As a valued {{ $json.plan }} customer, we'd like to offer you an exclusive {{ $json.discount_percentage }}% discount on your next renewal.

Your Personal Code: {{ $json.retention_code }}
Valid for: {{ $json.code_valid_days }} days

Additionally, we'd love to schedule a free 1-on-1 consultation with our success team to help you maximize your results.

Book your session here: [Calendar Link]

We're committed to your success.

Best regards,
Customer Success Team

parameters.subject: =Checking In - How Can We Help You Succeed?
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.customer_name }},

We hope you're enjoying your {{ $json.plan }} plan!

We wanted to check in and share some resources that might help you get even more value:

📚 Recommended Resources:
- [Advanced Tutorial Link]
- [Best Practices Guide]
- [Video Walkthrough]

If you have any questions or would like personalized guidance, our team is here to help.

Schedule a quick call: [Calendar Link]

Best regards,
Customer Success Team

parameters.subject: =Thank You! + Exclusive Upgrade Opportunity
parameters.message:
=Dear {{ $json.customer_name }},

Thank you for being an amazing customer! We're thrilled to have you with us.

Since you're getting great value from our {{ $json.plan }} plan, we'd love your feedback:

⭐ Leave a Testimonial: [Testimonial Link]

Also, we have an exclusive offer for you:
🚀 Upgrade to {{ $json.plan === 'Pro' ? 'Enterprise' : 'Pro' }} and get 15% off for the first 3 months.
Use code: UPGRADE15

Interested? Reply to this email and we'll set it up for you.

Best regards,
Customer Success Team

values.content:
=Generate a monthly Customer Success report from this health score data:

{{ JSON.stringify($input.first().json) }}

Provide a JSON response with:
- total_customers_analyzed (number)
- high_risk_count (number)
- medium_risk_count (number)
- healthy_count (number)
- avg_health_score (number)
- predicted_churn_rate (percentage)
- retention_campaigns_sent (number)
- estimated_revenue_saved (number, in USD)
- top_churn_reasons (array of 3 reasons)
- monthly_summary (3-4 sentences)
- strategic_recommendations (array of 4 actionable items for leadership)

Return only valid JSON.

parameters.subject: =Monthly Customer Success & Churn Prevention Report - {{ $now.toFormat('yyyy-MM') }}
